events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk. A rigging hook with its safety latch missing or tied back defeats the latch's purpose of retaining the sling/load in the hook throat, creating a dropped-load hazard — non-compliant with ASME B30.10 and OSHA 1926.251(a)(4). Work must stop, the hook be tagged out and replaced/repaired, and the assembly re-inspected before any lift proceeds.
